title: Sticky Honey
description: Allows you to stick to honey or slime with your head
body:
**Lets you to stick to honey or slime with your head (like in some parkour levels)**

## Sticky Honey and Slime
- Now you will be able to keep your head on blocks of slime or blocks of honey.
- You will also be able to “get off” slime or honey blocks by sneaking around
